WINE_FOX.title: Wine Fox
WINE_FOX.description: A fox maid who digs for materials, builds momentum, and turns resources into advantage.
WINE_FOX.flavor: A quiet maid from another world, carrying tools, discipline, and more strength than she first lets on.
WINE_FOX.goldMonologue: A little extra funding never hurts.
WINE_FOX.eventDeathPrevention: Not yet. I can still keep going.
WINE_FOX.aromaPrinciple: A good brew needs patience, balance, and pressure.
WINE_FOX.cardsModifierDescription: Mine [gold]Planks[/gold] and [gold]Cobblestones[/gold], use [gold]Digging[/gold] to increase yields, and let [gold]Stress[/gold] double key gains.
WINE_FOX.banter.dead.endTurnPing: I'm down. Finish it for me.
WINE_FOX.unlockText: Play a single run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
